rows.content: AUTOMATIC PROFILE CREATE+ Indicate whether you want SPF/PC to create
Y+- When a file is edited for which there is no profile, and a
profile variable is altered from the default setting, create
N+- Do not create profiles automatically under any circumstance.
See FILE PROFILE for details on how to create a profile
VIRTUAL LOAD+  Virtual load enables large files to be edited before
the entire document has been read into memory.  For example, if
you are editing a 2 Megabyte text file, Virtual Load would only
load the first 64K into memory, until some command required
that data be paged in.  Disabling Virtual Load forces the entire
file to be loaded into memory before it may be Edited/Browsed.
